# OCCP — OpenCloud Control Plane

> Agent Control Plane with Verified Autonomy Pipeline.
> Every autonomous action verified, logged, and reversible — before it runs.
> Open source (MIT), self-hostable, EU AI Act Art. 14 compliant.

## Quick links

- [Landing page](https://occp.ai)
- [Dashboard (Mission Control)](https://dash.occp.ai)
- [Docs](https://docs.occp.ai)
- [API status](https://api.occp.ai/api/v1/status)
- [API reference (OpenAPI JSON)](https://api.occp.ai/api/v1/openapi.json)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/azar-management-consulting/occp-core)

## Core concepts

- [Verified Autonomy Pipeline](https://docs.occp.ai/docs/concepts/verified-autonomy.md): The 5-gate pipeline (PLAN → VERIFY → APPROVE → EXECUTE → AUDIT).
- [Agent](https://docs.occp.ai/docs/concepts/agent.md): Scoped specialist that handles one class of task.
- [Policy](https://docs.occp.ai/docs/concepts/policy.md): Rego/OPA rules evaluated at VERIFY.
- [Skill](https://docs.occp.ai/docs/concepts/skill.md): Versioned, audit-logged capability.
- [MCP integration](https://docs.occp.ai/docs/concepts/mcp.md): Model Context Protocol bridge.

## Guides

- [Quickstart — 5 minute first verified action](https://docs.occp.ai/docs/quickstart.md)
- [Your first agent](https://docs.occp.ai/docs/guides/first-agent.md)
